query: SELECT equip_id, name, slot, hp_bonus, attack_bonus, defense_bonus, speed_bonus, resist_bonus FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE resist_bonus IS NOT NULL AND resist_bonus != '{"wood":0,"fire":0,"earth":0,"metal":0,"water":0}' AND resist_bonus != 'null' LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT equip_id, name, slot, hp_bonus, attack_bonus, defense_bonus, speed_bonus, resist_bonus FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE resist_bonus IS NOT NULL AND resist_bonus != '{"wood":0,"fire":0,"earth":0,"metal":0,"water":0}' AND resist_bonus != 'null' LIMIT 15;
